title: The Straw Hat Grand Fleet Is Born — Closing Beat
description: Luffy rejects command but accepts friendship, and the fleet forms itself around his freedom.
scene: On pages 12–13, Luffy, Bartolomeo, Sai, Colosseum Fighters, Straw Hat Pirates gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Rubbley and later sunny."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Today, in the waters off the coast of Dressrossa...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Nice Admiral basilille! We have a report!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A rather strange weather pattern was observed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Rubble's finally begun to fall, hasn't it!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: have the Straw Hats finally been done in!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, here's the thing... all the debris is somehow missing the boats, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What the blazes is going on- DARA!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I really have no right to pursue you all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'd like to keep me all this is a secret, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: For all you've done in keeping the government's ass clean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'd like to thank you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: From the bottom of my heart!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I heard that, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ag41

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Looks like they set sail safely.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I'm glad. Lucy... I wonder if I'll ever meet him again.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fuffufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Feels warm, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Ever so warm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Hm? What's this? You crying again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: No,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I- I'm not crying, damn it! Don't be silly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Now then, boys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: time to celebrate that in our fight with Mingo's family,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: A most unprecedented ''underling's vow'' took place here today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Yeeea Aaaah HH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...ch. Boo/end

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: We may never know whether they were drawn to him or if they had some other plan in mind, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Today, 7 Rogers declared themselves

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Straw Hat Luffy's underlings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: each will soon grow into their own, and leave their mark on history itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: They will be responsible for a pivotal occurrence in this age, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: That is a tale...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: that has yet to be told.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: birth of the Straw Hat grand fleet!

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
